section-01-scaffold-vite-react-ts.notes: Added Vite React TypeScript scaffold, scripts, dependencies, and Node/Vite compatibility update.

section-02-typed-api-client.notes: Added typed API client, API types, SSE parser, and legacy config migration helper.

section-03-app-shell-dashboard.notes: Added React app shell, language/status state, independent skill/config loading, and Dashboard page.

section-04-config-page.notes: Added Config page with encrypted config API flows, provider key cards, model fallback editor, migration, and key rotation.

section-05-run-skill-page.notes: Added schema-driven Run Skill page with field rendering, image uploads, SSE run flow, output tabs, and Thai Cats sample.

section-06-static-serving.notes: Updated server static serving to prefer frontend/dist, keep public fallback, preserve API precedence, and deny sensitive paths.

section-07-verification-cleanup.notes: Added Playwright smoke tests, frontend verification script, and README updates.
